rule_metadata.author: Dimitrios Slamaris
rule_metadata.title: DHCP Server Loaded the CallOut DLL

rules.rule_text:
title: DHCP Server Loaded the CallOut DLL
id: 13fc89a9-971e-4ca6-b9dc-aa53a445bf40
status: test
description: This rule detects a DHCP server in which a specified Callout DLL (in
  registry) was loaded
references:
- https://blog.3or.de/mimilib-dhcp-server-callout-dll-injection.html
- https://technet.microsoft.com/en-us/library/cc726884(v=ws.10).aspx
- https://msdn.microsoft.com/de-de/library/windows/desktop/aa363389(v=vs.85).aspx
author: Dimitrios Slamaris
date: 2017-05-15
modified: 2022-12-25
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1574.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: system
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 1033
    Provider_Name: Microsoft-Windows-DHCP-Server
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
